abort.description: Aborts the download and deletes the file that was downloaded.

getDownloadedTarget.description: Returns the target file if the download has succeeded.

getDownloadSize.description: Returns the download size in bytes.

getDownloadSpeed.description: Returns the current download speed in bytes / second.

getFullURL.description: Returns the full URL of the download.

getNumBytesDownloaded.description: Returns the number of bytes downloaded.

getProgress.description: Returns the progress ratio from 0 to 1.

getStatusText.description: Returns a descriptive text of the current download state (eg. "Downloading" or "Paused").

isRunning.description: Checks if the download is currently active.

stop.description: Stops the download. The target file will not be deleted and you can resume the download later.
